results.summary: JPM remains the quality leader in the group with strong profitability, a solid Q1 earnings beat on revenue and EPS growth, and a stable capital-markets/news backdrop. The latest snapshot shows a $297.69 share price, $793.4B market cap, 13.8x P/E, 2.18x P/B, and 15.9% ROE. Recent headlines were mostly note issuances, alongside a supportive Reuters piece on JPMorgan's tech investment-banking franchise.
